selection_basis: minimum business cost under review_rate <= 25%; min_recall >= 55%
policy_description: Conservative review workload; may miss more defaults.

selection_basis: minimum business cost under review_rate <= 30%; min_recall >= 60%
policy_description: Balanced risk capture and operational capacity.

selection_basis: minimum business cost under review_rate <= 35%; min_recall >= 65%
policy_description: More default capture with higher review workload.

selection_basis: minimum business cost under review_rate <= 40%; min_recall >= 70%
policy_description: Higher risk capture; greater customer/operations friction.
